review.title: I recommend this hotel
review.text: Lovely little 3-star hotel, dining terrace with an extraordinary view of Saint-Jean-Cap-Ferrat, perfect for breakfast. Buffet featuring high-quality products and fresh, homemade fruit juices. The owners are very charming and friendly, as is the staff. The room was very suitable for July, with reasonable rates for this period. There is a pool and jacuzzi to relax. My friend and I spent 3 very pleasant days here.
